article_meta.title: — News —Study Shows Pandemic Saw Rise In Firearm Injuries Among KidsBy Charlotte Pence Bond•Dec 20, 2022 DailyWire.com•F

reasoning: The summary maintains neutral, clinical language, avoids adopting the article’s loaded terms, and attributes findings to studies and experts. No subjective judgments are stated as fact. Minor omission of mitigating details (declines among some subgroups) slightly affects completeness but not framing neutrality.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs (found, cited, indicated) without adopting charged phrasing from the article.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All claims are tied to studies or expert sources mentioned in the article.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective labels are presented as facts; evaluative statements are attributed to experts.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No dramatic or alarming language beyond reported findings.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or derogatory characterizations.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: Does not infer motives or mental states beyond what sources state.
custom_reasoning.slant: No competing perspectives to favor; coverage mirrors the article’s evidence-based focus.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Omits the article’s note about declining homicide rates for certain subgroups, a mitigating context.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Avoids loaded adjectives like 'disastrous' used in the source.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Focuses on increases without the countervailing declines mentioned for some groups.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Treats institutional sources and experts neutrally without privileging one type.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than the source; no adoption of its emotive framing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Captures main findings and contributing factors but leaves out subgroup declines and context about policy impacts.
